summary: polyglot-demos is a multi-language demonstration repository with hello-world programs in TypeScript, Python, Rust, Go, and Ruby. Each language has a simple main that prints a greeting using only standard library I/O. The repository showcases build and lint configurations (ESLint, Black, rustfmt, RuboCop, etc.) but uses no production frameworks—only development tools.

entrypoints.description: TypeScript hello world; run with bun
Python hello world; run with python
Rust hello world; Cargo.toml bin rust-demo, run with cargo run
Go hello world; run with go run
Ruby hello world; run with ruby

key_directories.role: TypeScript demonstration with main and test
Python demonstration with main and test
Rust demonstration with main and inline test
Go demonstration with main and test
Ruby demonstration with main and test
